title: idleProgress
description: 🛡️ Level up stats, master RPG classes, and explore a world full of quests! 🌲 Realistic landscapes and new bosses.
body:
# ⚔️ Welcome to idleProgress

**idleProgress** is a comprehensive RPG modpack that transforms your Minecraft world into a true fantasy adventure with deep progression and challenging mechanics.

### 🎭 Choose Your Path
Select your playstyle with a dedicated **Class System**. Become a precise **Archer**, a powerful **Wizard**, or discover other unique archetypes as you level up.

### 💨 Dynamic Combat & Movement
*   **Dash Mechanic:** Master the art of movement to dodge enemy attacks and navigate terrain.
*   **Stats System:** Improve your character's attributes to become an unstoppable force.
*   **Epic Arsenal:** Dozens of new weapons and food items to help you survive the journey.

### 🌍 A Living, Breathing World
*   **New Mobs & Bosses:** Face terrifying new creatures and legendary bosses in epic encounters.
*   **Enhanced Exploration:** Explore realistic forests with immersive trees and discover new, detailed structures.
*   **Quests:** Complete challenging quests to earn rewards and progress through the story.

---
*Ready to start your journey? Download idleProgress and forge your destiny!*
